category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Nepal EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入尼泊尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入尼泊爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Nepal NBSM conformity expectations, NEA grid-connection coordination, IEC 61851 safety and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector alignment, Nepal's 230/400 V 50 Hz utility context, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与尼泊尔NBSM合格评定预期、NEA并网协调、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC证据、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口适配、尼泊尔230/400 V 50 Hz公用电网背景，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與尼泊爾NBSM合格評定預期、NEA併網協調、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC證據、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口適配、尼泊爾230/400 V 50 Hz公用電網背景，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Nepal, the confirmed practical gaps are NBSM conformity review as Nepal's national standards authority, NEA coordination for grid-connected installations on Nepal's 230/400 V 50 Hz system, IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 safety evidence, IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence, and connector alignment with the Nepal project specification. Nepal is a real South Asian EV growth market: electric four-wheeler imports have surged, electricity is hydro-dominant, and policy has favored EV adoption through comparatively favorable import duties. Charging infrastructure is expanding but still uneven, so site-level NEA capacity and installation review remain important. The connector reality is mixed: Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC are the IEC-aligned direction, while GB/T connectors appear because Chinese-brand EVs and chargers are common. A GB/T 20234-only charger is physically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 deployments and needs hardware and communication redesign. A blanket Nepal charger-specific mandatory certification rule could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify current NBSM import/conformity scope, NEA connection requirements, HS code, charger type, and project specifications before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入尼泊尔时，已确认的实务差距包括：作为尼泊尔国家标准主管机关的NBSM合格评定审查；针对尼泊尔230/400 V 50 Hz系统的NEA并网协调；IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全证据；IEC 61000 EMC及电能质量证据；以及与尼泊尔项目规格一致的接口配置。尼泊尔是南亚真实增长的电动汽车市场：电动四轮车进口大幅增长，电力以水电为主，政策通过相对优惠的进口税推动EV采用。充电基础设施正在扩张但仍不均衡，因此场地级NEA容量和安装审查仍然重要。接口现实是混合的：Type 2交流和CCS2直流是IEC体系方向，但由于中国品牌EV和充电设备常见，GB/T接口也存在。仅支持GB/T 20234的充电桩与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理上不兼容，需要硬件和通信重新设计。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认尼泊尔针对所有充电桩整机的单一强制认证规则；出口商应在出货前核实现行NBSM进口/合格评定范围、NEA接入要求、HS编码、充电桩类型和项目规格。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入尼泊爾時，已確認的實務差距包括：作為尼泊爾國家標準主管機關的NBSM合格評定審查；針對尼泊爾230/400 V 50 Hz系統的NEA併網協調；IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全證據；IEC 61000 EMC及電能品質證據；以及與尼泊爾項目規格一致的接口配置。尼泊爾是南亞真實增長的電動汽車市場：電動四輪車進口大幅增長，電力以水電為主，政策通過相對優惠的進口稅推動EV採用。充電基礎設施正在擴張但仍不均衡，因此場地級NEA容量和安裝審查仍然重要。接口現實是混合的：Type 2交流和CCS2直流是IEC體系方向，但由於中國品牌EV和充電設備常見，GB/T接口也存在。僅支持GB/T 20234的充電樁與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理上不兼容，需要硬體和通訊重新設計。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認尼泊爾針對所有充電樁整機的單一強制認證規則；出口商應在出貨前核實現行NBSM進口/合格評定範圍、NEA接入要求、HS編碼、充電樁類型和項目規格。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NBSM conformity scope determination, NEA grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, tax advice, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Nepal NBSM standards and conformity rules, NEA connection requirements, IEC standard editions, project specifications, and customs treatment with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NBSM合格评定范围裁定、NEA并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定、税务建议或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行尼泊尔NBSM标准及合格评定规则、NEA接入要求、IEC标准版本、项目规格和海关处理。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NBSM合格評定範圍裁定、NEA併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、稅務建議或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行尼泊爾NBSM標準及合格評定規則、NEA接入要求、IEC標準版本、項目規格和海關處理。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
